name: Gather Victim Host Information: Client Configurations (network fingerprint)
description: Reconnaissance / TA0043. Enumerate the host's network interface configuration. Read-only inspection of `ip addr` (or `ifconfig` fallback) plus `/etc/resolv.conf`. Captures interface names, MACs, IPv4/IPv6 addresses, DNS resolvers. No network traffic — just reads kernel/userland config. Useful for reconnaissance fingerprinting; safe to run on localhost.
exec: echo '--- ip addr ---'; ip -brief addr 2>&1 | head -20 || ifconfig -a 2>&1 | head -40; echo '--- /etc/resolv.conf ---'; cat /etc/resolv.conf 2>/dev/null | head -10 || echo '(no resolv.conf)'
